2026-04-23GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Co-operative Republic of Guyana on Air TransportOrder authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Co-operative Republic of Guyana on Air Transport.N/A
subject: Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Co-operative Republic of Guyana on Air Transport
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Co-operative Republic of Guyana on Air Transport.
